legal_description: A certain lot or parcel of land located on the easterly side of Dana C. Doe in Portland, County of Cumberland, State of Maine, being Lot 2 as shown on a plan recorded in the Cumberland County Registry of Deeds in Book 240, Page 12.
limited_common_elements: the loading dock and the parking spaces designated for each Unit on the Plats and Plans
use_restrictions: Pat D. Moe shall be used only for office, light-industrial and related commercial purposes permitted by applicable zoning.
special_declarant_rights: the right to complete the improvements shown on the Plats and Plans, the right to add Phase 2 units within seven years, and the right to maintain sales offices and signs
unit_boundaries: the interior unfinished surfaces of the Unit's perimeter walls, floors and ceilings, all as shown on the Plats and Plans; all lath, furring, wallboard, plasterboard, plaster, paneling, tiles, wallpaper, paint, finished flooring and any other materials constituting any part of the finished surfaces thereof are part of the Unit, and all other portions of the walls, floors or ceilings are part of the Jordan J. Moe
